<!-- Page Type: FAQ -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.7 -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{META_DESCRIPTION}">
    
    <!-- Schema: FAQPage (Google EEAT Signal!) -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "FAQPage",
      "mainEntity": [
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "{QUESTION_1}",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "{ANSWER_1}"
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "{QUESTION_2}",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "{ANSWER_2}"
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "{QUESTION_3}",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "{ANSWER_3}"
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "{QUESTION_4}",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "{ANSWER_4}"
          }
        },
        {
          "@type": "Question",
          "name": "{QUESTION_5}",
          "acceptedAnswer": {
            "@type": "Answer",
            "text": "{ANSWER_5}"
          }
        }
      ]
    }
    </script>

    <!-- Schema: WebPage (Additional EEAT Signal) -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "WebPage",
      "name": "{TITLE}",
      "description": "{META_DESCRIPTION}",
      "url": "{URL_CANONICAL}",
      "inLanguage": "en-US"
    }
    </script>

    <!-- Schema: Article (Content Context) -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "Article",
      "headline": "{TITLE}",
      "author": {
        "@type": "Person",
        "name": "{AUTHOR_NAME}"
      },
      "datePublished": "{DATE_FORMATTED}",
      "mainEntityOfPage": {
        "@type": "WebPage"
      }
    }
    </script>

    <!-- Author Bio for EEAT (Google's E-E-A-T Requirement!) -->
    <div itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Person">
      <meta itemprop="name" content="{AUTHOR_NAME}">
      <meta itemprop="jobTitle" content="{AUTHOR_TITLE}">
      <meta itemprop="description" content="{AUTHOR_BIO_150_CHARS_MAX}">
    </div>

</head>
<body>

    <!-- HERO SECTION with Author Attribution -->
    <header class="faq-hero">
        <h1>{H1_TITLE}</h1>
        <p>{HERO_SUBHEADLINE_200_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        <div class="meta-info">{WORD_COUNT_WORDS} questions answered | Last updated: {POST_DATE_FORMATTED}</div>
    </header>

    <!-- INTRODUCTION H2 -->
    <section class="intro">
        <h2>{INTRO_H2_TITLE}</h2>
        <p>{INTRO_CONTENT_500_CHARS_MAX} — These answers are based on real-world testing and expert experience.</p>
    </section>

    <!-- MAIN FAQ BODY with Accordion-Style H3s -->
    <main class="faq-body">

        <!-- QUESTION 1 SECTION (H2 + Q/A) -->
        <article itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Question" itemprop="mainEntity">
            <h2 itemprop="name">{QUESTION_1}</h2>
            
            <section itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
                <div itemprop="text">
                    {ANSWER_1}

                    <!-- Sub-questions within answer (H3/H4 for depth) -->
                    <h3>{SUB_QUESTION_WITHIN_ANSWER}</h3>
                    <p>{SUB_ANSWER_CONTENT}</p>
                </div>
            </section>
        </article>

        <!-- QUESTION 2 SECTION -->
        <article itemprop="mainEntity">
            <h2 itemprop="name">{QUESTION_2}</h2>
            
            <section itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
                <div itemprop="text">
                    {ANSWER_2}

                    <!-- Sub-questions within answer -->
                    <h3>{SUB_QUESTION_WITHIN_ANSWER}</h3>
                    <p>{SUB_ANSWER_CONTENT}</p>
                </div>
            </section>
        </article>

        <!-- QUESTION 3 SECTION (Longer Answer with Table) -->
        <article itemprop="mainEntity">
            <h2 itemprop="name">{QUESTION_3}</h2>
            
            <section itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
                <div itemprop="text">
                    {ANSWER_3}

                    <!-- Comparison Table for EEAT Signal -->
                    <table class="comparison-table">
                        <thead>
                            <tr><th>Metric</th>{TH_COMPARISON_COL}</tr>
                        </thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <tr><td>{ROW_DATA_1_METRIC}</td><td>{ROW_DATA_1_VALUE}</td></tr>
                            <tr><td>{ROW_DATA_2_METRIC}</td><td>{ROW_DATA_2_VALUE}</td></tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>

                    <!-- Actionable Takeaway -->
                    <h3>{ACTIONABLE_TAKEAWAY_TITLE}</h3>
                    <p>{TAKEAWAY_CONTENT}</p>
                </div>
            </section>
        </article>

        <!-- QUESTION 4 SECTION (Myth-Busting Format) -->
        <article itemprop="mainEntity">
            <h2 itemprop="name">{QUESTION_4}</h2>
            
            <section itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
                <div itemprop="text">
                    {ANSWER_4}

                    <!-- Myth vs Reality Table -->
                    <table class="myth-vs-reality">
                        <thead><tr><th>Myth</th><th>Reality (Based on Testing)</th></tr></thead>
                        <tbody>
                            <tr><td>{MYTH_1}</td><td>{REALITY_1}</td></tr>
                            <tr><td>{MYTH_2}</td><td>{REALITY_2}</td></tr>
                        </tbody>
                    </table>

                    <!-- Expert Tip for EEAT -->
                    <aside class="expert-tip">
                        <h4>💡 Expert Insight:</h4>
                        <p>{EXPERT_INSIGHT_CONTENT}</p>
                    </aside>
                </div>
            </section>
        </article>

        <!-- QUESTION 5 SECTION (Conclusion + Next Steps) -->
        <article itemprop="mainEntity">
            <h2 itemprop="name">{QUESTION_5}</h2>
            
            <section itemprop="acceptedAnswer" itemscope itemtype="https://schema.org/Answer">
                <div itemprop="text">
                    {ANSWER_5}

                    <!-- Call-to-Action for Related Products/Guides -->
                    <p class="cta">{CTA_CONTENT}</p>
                    
                    <!-- Internal Linking H6s (Related Questions) -->
                    <footer class="related-faqs">
                        <h6><a href="{RELATED_FAQ_1}">{LINK_TITLE_Faq_1}</a></h6>
                        <h6><a href="{RELATED_FAQ_2}">{LINK_TITLE_Faq_2}</a></h6>
                    </footer>
                </div>
            </section>
        </article>

    </main>

    <!-- INTERNAL LINKING H6s (Related Articles) -->
    <footer class="related-articles">
        <h3><strong>You might also want to read:</strong></h3>
        
        <h6><a href="{RELATED_PAGE_1}">{LINK_TITLE_ARTICLE_1}</a></h6>
        <h6><a href="{RELATED_PAGE_2}">{LINK_TITLE_ARTICLE_2}</a></h6>
    </footer>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Replace {PLACEHOLDER} text before generation -->
<!-- FAQ pages require 5+ Q&A pairs for Google's Featured Snippet eligibility! -->
<!-- Always include author attribution and expert insights to boost E-E-A-T signals. -->
